korean_text: 이건 처방전 없이 살 수 있어요?
romanization: igeon cheobangjeom eopsi sal su isseoyo?

english_text: How often should I take this?
korean_text: 이 약은 얼마나 자주 먹어야 해요?
romanization: i yageun eolmana jaju meogeeoya haeyo?

english_text: Take it three times a day
Can I take this with other medicine?
Is this medicine safe for children?
How long until the medicine is ready?

korean_text: 벌레 물린 데 바르는 약 주세요
romanization: beolle mullin de bareuneun yak juseyo

english_text: Can I get a generic version?
I need to check my blood pressure
I need to refill my prescription
I feel tired all the time
